response:
the sacred verses of siriragau mahala 3 speak of the spirit that is awakened through devotion and the grace of the guru gene of the soul is revealed when one surrenders to the divine language of the scriptures visit the path of truth and find peace within the self  
***  
the journey of the soul is guided by the guru's wisdom and the light of the spirit is illuminated through sincere service the language of the heart connects with the divine and the visit to the sacred path brings enlightenment and transformation the soul finds its true essence through the grace of the guru and the power of the sacred word
